control_card.C: Deterministic Python emitter with rows JSON, rows CSV, summary JSON, Markdown report, validate(), and main().
control_card.F: Any missing required row, missing 2u1 partial_z^2 psi1 term, closed global proof, or Clay promotion fails validation.
control_card.G: Validation passes only if blockers remain open, global proof is not closed, and Clay promotion is false.
control_card.L: Local barrier rows are supported; global concavity and secondary-peak rows remain open blockers.
control_card.O: Worker owns only the Sprint137 axial monotonicity gate emitter and its output directory surface.
control_card.P: Keep the route conditional/fail-closed and use it only as a gate inventory for later Hou-Luo analysis.
control_card.R: Model AxialMonotonicityOfSwirlProfile for v=partial_z u1 without turning local barrier support into a global theorem.
control_card.S: Symmetry, initial sign, first-crossing, differentiated source, local concavity, and diffusion sign are explicit ledger states.

first_positive_crossing_criterion: At the first time when v becomes positive in the monitored half-profile, the interior positive maximum has v>0, partial_r v=partial_z v=0, and Ltilde v<=0.
u1_equation: D_t u1 = 2 u1 partial_z psi1 + nu Ltilde u1
v_barrier_equation: D_t v = nu Ltilde v + 2 v partial_z psi1 + 2 u1 partial_z^2 psi1 - (partial_z u^r) partial_r u1 - (partial_z u^z) v
